title: OAL
description: Work on OpenAgentLayer source records, provider renderers, deployment, plugin payloads, manifests, and acceptance gates. Use for OAL-specific generator/deployer behavior.
body: Authored OAL source is the product input. Generated provider files are outputs. Change source records, prompt templates, runtime hooks, renderers, deploy logic, or acceptance checks so behavior is owned end to end. Use provider-native agents when available. Keep stable, slow-changing repo invariants in provider instruction files; keep fast-changing workflows in skills, hooks, commands, or rendered agents when the provider reload path supports them. In default Codex CLI sessions, use `oal codex peer batch <task>`, `oal opendex`, `opendex`, or Symphony workflow commands for bounded OpenDex/Symphony orchestration. In Codex CLI sessions with a native subagent profile explicitly enabled, spawn custom agents by their rendered OAL agent name, wait for their results, and merge only final summaries, diff evidence, and validation results in the parent thread.
